title: Cleaner shrimp
description: Various crustaceans sharing a common name
extract: Cleaner shrimp is a common name for a number of swimming decapod crustaceans that clean other organisms of parasites. Most are found in the families Hippolytidae and Palaemonidae, though the families Alpheidae, Pandalidae, and Stenopodidae each contain at least one species of cleaner shrimp. The term "cleaner shrimp" is sometimes used more specifically for the family Hippolytidae and the genus Lysmata.
extract_html: Cleaner shrimp is a common name for a number of swimming decapod crustaceans that clean other organisms of parasites. The term "cleaner shrimp" is sometimes used more specifically for the family Hippolytidae and the genus Lysmata.
